name: Rayne State Bank & Trust Company
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank in Louisiana offering personal and business checking, savings, and mobile banking services across the Acadiana region.
description_long:
Rayne State Bank & Trust Company is an established community bank headquartered in Rayne, Louisiana, operating as a traditional brick-and-mortar financial institution with FDIC insurance backing. The bank serves the Acadiana region through multiple physical branch locations and ATM networks, providing retail and business customers with deposit accounts and basic banking services.

The bank's core offerings include personal savings accounts, business checking platforms, mobile banking through the RSB Mobile app, online banking portals for both retail and business customers, check reordering, Zelle money transfer integration, financial calculators, e-statements, and ATM access. They position business checking as a key service offering and emphasize accessibility and convenience through their digital channels.

Rayne State Bank distinguishes itself primarily as a regional community bank with established physical presence across multiple Louisiana locations including Rayne, Carencro, Guilbeau, Lafayette, Lake Charles, and Crowley. The bank emphasizes account security and fraud prevention, explicitly warning customers that the bank will never call requesting sensitive information. They offer both their own ATM network and partnerships with First National Bank of Louisiana ATMs.

The bank's profile is limited by the website content available: specific interest rates, loan products, credit cards, and detailed account features are not prominently displayed on the homepage or branch locator pages reviewed. No information about minimum balances, fees, mortgage services, business lending, or investment products appears in the accessible website sections, which limits comprehensive evaluation of their competitive positioning relative to regional and national banking alternatives.
services: ATM access (First National Bank of Louisiana partner ATMs)
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. government guarantee
Multiple physical branch locations across Acadiana region (Rayne, Carencro, Guilbeau, Kaliste Saloom, University, Church Point)
Zelle integration for peer-to-peer money transfers directly from accounts
Mobile banking app (RSB Mobile) for convenient account access
Dual online banking portals for both retail and business customers
Strong fraud awareness and security messaging to protect customers
Extended ATM network including partnerships with First National Bank of Louisiana locations
cons: Limited information on website regarding interest rates, account fees, or minimum balance requirements
No visible mortgage, personal loan, or credit card products on main website sections
Branch network limited primarily to Louisiana, not suitable for national customer base
Website lacks transparency on loan products, business lending services, or investment offerings
Minimal details on account features, rates comparison tools, or competitive positioning
best_for: Louisiana residents in the Acadiana region seeking local community banking with physical branch access
Small business owners in South Louisiana needing business checking and local banking relationships
Customers prioritizing FDIC-insured deposits and established regional banking presence
diagnosis: Rayne State Bank & Trust Company is best for Louisiana residents and small business owners in the Acadiana region who value local community banking relationships and physical branch access. The main caveat is that the bank's website provides minimal information about specific products, rates, fees, and lending services, making it difficult to assess their competitiveness; potential customers should contact the bank directly at 337-334-3191 or 337-235-2062 for detailed account and service information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
